creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text:
The test _is_ present in FreeBSD 15.0-CURRENT.  It was added in May 2024.  You seem to be confusing two different test programs: one in sys/kern/ktls_test and one in sys/geom/class/eli .

Regarding the failure, I think you'll find that it's already been fixed by markj, in revision 81da8e39f78956441a27eb6bb55ac16170a21a14 .
